title: Searching Your Photos
drDigitalIntro:
When you have hundreds of photos, Search is the fastest way to find what you need.
• Type a word like 'dog' or 'beach' and matching photos appear instantly.
• Real photo apps also recognize faces — name someone once, and the app finds every photo of them.
• Let's practice searching to find a specific photo.

playgroundTask.goal: You found a photo by searching

steps.say: Type 'dog' in the search box to find all dog photos.
Click the Dog at the Park photo to open it.
Mark this one as a favorite so you can find it quickly later.

drDigitalSuccess: You searched, found, and favorited a photo! Search works by name, place, or even what's in the photo — try it on your own computer's Photos app.
drDigitalHint: Type 'dog' in the search bar at the top of the photo grid.
